defects.description: Aggregate evidence scoring can hide a rejected or low-quality source
defects.resolution: Per-source fail-closed scoring and provenance checks before aggregate acceptance

defects.description: Conflicting evidence can be silently averaged
defects.resolution: Explicit conflict record, severity, human adjudication and unresolved hold state

defects.description: Future commit/push workflows could regress to interactive Git cleanup prompts
defects.resolution: Build 0057 non-interactive Git guard retained as mandatory closure control

defects.description: RC1 Windows repository validation treated POST_IMPORT_REPOSITORY_VALIDATION.json as missing because the self-exclusion path normaliser replaced double backslashes instead of ordinary single backslashes
defects.resolution: RC1 withdrawn; normalise every single Windows backslash to a repository separator and regression-test the exact generated report path before RC2 release
